zh.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo於大約1669年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德奧易斯特 利維 帕里什。她於大約1693年與Joseph Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1756年1月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo于大约1669年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德奧易斯特 利維 帕里什。她于大约1693年与Joseph Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1756年1月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Denbo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Denbow
meanings: English (Devon): from the Middle English personal name Denebald, Denebaud (Old English Denebeald, formed with Dene ‘Dane’ + beald ‘bold, brave’).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: E
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鄂, a short form of present-day Hubei province: (i) from E (鄂), the name of an ancient state (located in Henan province), destroyed by the king Zhou, last king of the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Shanxi province) in the state of Jin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Hubei province) granted to the royal members of the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) possibly a surname from minority ethnic groups in southwestern China. (v) said to be adopted as a new surname by Yue Ting, who changed his original name Yue (嶽) to E (鄂), because he fled to Huangmei in present-day Hubei province (called E (鄂) at that time) to avoid persecution after his father Yue Fei (1103–1142  AD ), a famous Chinese general in the Southern Song dynasty (1127 – 1279  AD ), was put to death by the then emperor.

en.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo was born about 1669, in Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. She married Joseph Bunker about 1693, in British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died on 27 January 1756, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo est née environ 1669, à Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé Joseph Bunker environ 1693, à Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 janvier 1756, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo wurde um 1669 in Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat um 1693 in British Colonial America Joseph Bunker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Januar 1756 im Alter von 88 Jahren in New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo è nata il circa 1669 nel Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Lei sposato Joseph Bunker circa 1693, nel British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1756, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary E Denboは約1669年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードオイスター リバー パーイッシュで生まれた。約1693年にイギリス植民地アメリカでJoseph Bunkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1756年1月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアで88歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Durham, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람
ko.Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hamp: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 이스터 라이버 파리시
ko.Strafford, New Hampshire, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드
ko.probably Durham, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 뒤람
ko.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo(은)는 대략 1669년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 이스터 라이버 파리시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1693년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아에서 Joseph Bunker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1756년 1월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo nasceu aproximadamente 1669, em Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com Joseph Bunker aproximadamente 1693, em British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1756, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary E Denbo родилась около 1669 г. в местности оистир ривир пэриш, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Bunker около 1693 г. в местности бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла 27 января 1756 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 88 лет.
